input_context.instructions:
Task 2.8: Create Linux Terminal Adapter using AT-SPI2 CGO bindings.

YOU MUST USE file_write() TOOL CALLS. Format:
{"name": "write_file", "parameters": {"path": "internal/terminal/atspi2.h", "content": "..."}}

Create these 5 files:

1. internal/terminal/atspi2.h - C header
2. internal/terminal/atspi2.c - C implementation with AT-SPI2 APIs
3. internal/terminal/adapter_linux.go - Go adapter (//go:build linux)
4. internal/terminal/adapter_linux_stub.go - Stub (//go:build !linux)
5. internal/terminal/adapter_linux_test.go - Tests

Implement TerminalAdapter interface: Name(), Available(), ListSessions(), Capture(), Subscribe(), GetDimensions()

Use #cgo pkg-config: atspi-2 for Linux build.

Read spec at docs/tasks/2.8-spec.md for details.
input_context.escalation_from: L0-Coder (read files but no file_write calls)
